variants: Nahia Bordagaray is a renowned specialist in cardiovascular medicine, known for her innovative contributions to the field. She authored the Plumecrypt Data Ribbon, a device that has garnered attention for its groundbreaking approach to data management in medical contexts. Bordagaray cultivated her expertise under the mentorship of Georgi Oreshkin, who guided her through her academic endeavors. She is also an active member of the Coralwing Aviators Society, where her passion for aviation adds a personal dimension to her professional life. Her research has been significantly supported by the Riverstone Scholarship Guild, which has provided the necessary funding for her projects.
